method: Change-detection sweep against issuer pages (chase.com, americanexpress.com, capitalone.com, delta.com, marriott.com, hilton.com, united.com, hyatt.com, ihg.com, southwest.com, Chase/DoorDash co-brand terms, thecenturionlounge.com, clearme.com), run by four parallel per-issuer agents against the fully-verified 2026-07-19 baseline. Reputable trackers used only as labelled secondary confirmation where issuer pages are JavaScript-gated or login-gated.

benefits.how: Automatic on any travel purchase each account-anniversary year. Credited purchases earn no points.
Up to $250 back per prepaid 2-night-min Edit booking via Chase Travel, max $500/yr. Flexible calendar-year since 1/1/26 — no more H1/H2 windows.

Prepaid Chase Travel bookings (2-night min) at IHG, Montage, Pendry, Omni, Virgin, Minor, Pan Pacific. Automatic. Chase states an end date of 12/31/26. No successor announced -- but Chase has NOT said it won't be renewed, so "final year" is our inference, not issuer text.

$150 Jan–Jun + $150 Jul–Dec at Sapphire Exclusive Tables restaurants booked via OpenTable; pay with card. Roster churns: ~7/7/26 Chase added 91 and removed 64 restaurants (404 total; Las Vegas cut from 9 to 1). Grace period per Chase CS: a reservation booked BEFORE a restaurant was removed still earns the credit for up to 60 days after removal. Re-check the list before booking.
$150 per half on StubHub/viagogo tickets. Activation required. Runs through 12/31/27.
$5 restaurant + two $10 non-restaurant promos monthly with active DashPass, paying with card. Apply at checkout; no rollover. Through 12/31/27.

Complimentary DashPass (Chase values at $120/yr), minimum one year from activation. ACTIVATE BY 12/31/27 (earlier tracker note said 12/31/26 -- that was wrong; Chase's page says activate by 12/31/27). One DashPass per DoorDash account -- pick which card feeds each account.
Up to $10 in-app Lyft credit monthly through 9/30/27; pay with card in Lyft app. Plus 5x on Lyft.
$10/mo on eligible Peloton memberships through 12/31/27; activation required. 10x on Peloton equipment >$150.
Complimentary through 6/22/27 (~$288/yr value). Activate by linking Apple ID via Chase Benefits & Rewards.
Up to $120 every 4 years for the application fee charged to the card. Automatic.
Chase Sapphire Lounges + 1,300+ Priority Pass lounges + Air Canada Maple Leaf; you + 2 guests. Enroll in PP Select first. AUs ($195) get own access.
Complimentary through 12/31/27 — link your IHG account under Benefits on chase.com/app to activate.
$75k calendar spend: IHG Diamond, Hyatt Explorist, Southwest A-List, $500 Southwest Chase Travel credit, $250 Shops at Chase credit.

Limited-time (added 7/1/26): REGISTER via Chase by 9/30/26 to receive 3 months complimentary Marriott Bonvoy Gold. Then complete 3 paid Marriott-direct nights DURING that 3-month window (not by 9/30/26) to keep Gold through Feb 2028 -- so a September registrant has until roughly end of December. Excludes those already Gold or higher; award nights & OTA/Chase Travel stays don't count.
8x Chase Travel (incl. Edit); 4x flights + hotels direct; 3x dining; 5x Lyft (thru 9/30/27); 1x other.

1:1 to partners. CSR keeps Hyatt 1:1 -- the 4:3 cut (announced 6/15/26; immediate for accounts opened on/after that date, 10/1/26 for earlier accounts) hit Sapphire Preferred / Ink Business Preferred / Ink Plus / Corporate Flex only. Points Boost up to 2x on select Chase Travel; base 1c.
Primary CDW to $75k. Trip cancel/interrupt $10k/person, $20k/trip; delay 6+hrs $500; $1M travel accident; $100k evac.
Automatic on travel purchases each account-anniversary year.
Up to $500/yr on Edit bookings, max $250/transaction (2-night min, prepaid). Calendar-year flexible since 1/1/26.

Prepaid Chase Travel bookings (2-night min) at IHG, Montage, Pendry, Omni, Virgin, Minor, Pan Pacific. Chase states an end date of 12/31/26. No successor announced -- but Chase has NOT said it won't be renewed, so "final year" is our inference, not issuer text.
$200 Jan–Jun + $200 Jul–Dec directly with ZipRecruiter. Watch auto-renew (~$299/mo plans); charge must post inside the window.
Automatic, per calendar year, directly with Google Workspace. Benefit runs through 12/31/27.
$50 Jan–Jun + $50 Jul–Dec on curated gift cards at giftcards.com/reservebusiness.
Same structure as personal CSR ($5 + 2×$10). Needs its OWN DoorDash account (separate email) — one DashPass per account. Through 12/31/27.
Complimentary DashPass, minimum one year from activation; ACTIVATE BY 12/31/27. DoorDash's own FAQ says to create a second account (different email) to stack with a personal Sapphire card.
Up to $10/mo in-app Lyft credit through 9/30/27; pay with card in Lyft app.
Up to $120 every 4 years for the application fee charged to the card.
Same lounge network as personal; you + 2 guests. Employee cardmembers NOT covered (they enter as your guests).
Complimentary through 12/31/27; link IHG account via Chase Benefits.
$120k calendar spend: Hyatt Explorist, IHG Diamond, Southwest A-List, up to $500 Southwest credit + $500 Shops at Chase.
8x Chase Travel; 4x flights + hotels direct; 3x social/search ads; 5x Lyft (thru 9/30/27); 1x other. No dining bonus. Free employee cards.
1:1 to UR partners incl. Hyatt -- the 6/15/26 Hyatt 4:3 cut excludes both Reserves (hit CSP/Ink only). Points Boost up to 2x.
Primary CDW on business rentals to $75k. Cell phone: $1,000/claim, 3 claims/12mo, $100 deductible, bill paid with card.
Doubled from $50 in the 6/15/26 refresh. Automatic on prepaid Chase Travel hotel stays, per anniversary year.
NEW 6/15/26: up to $120 every 4 years, automatic when fee charged to card.
NEW: complimentary Apple TV for one year; activate by 12/31/26 via Benefits & Rewards.
One $10 promo/mo (grocery/retail) with active DashPass, paying with card. No restaurant promo on CSP. Through 12/31/27.
Complimentary DashPass, minimum one year from activation; ACTIVATE BY 12/31/27. One DashPass per DoorDash account.
ENDING: earns only on purchases through 10/1/26 for existing cardholders (posts by 1/31/27). Gone for new applicants.

⚠️ Hyatt transfers fall 1:1 -> 4:3. Announced 6/15/26: IMMEDIATE for accounts opened on/after 6/15/26; accounts opened before 6/15/26 keep 1:1 THROUGH 9/30/26, then drop 10/1/26. Move UR->Hyatt from the CSP before then, or transfer via your CSR (both Reserves stay 1:1).
5x Chase Travel; 3x dining, streaming, online groceries, NEW gas/EV + vacation rentals; 2x other travel; 1x other.
NEW 6/15/26: up to $100k evacuation/transport when sick/injured 100+ miles from home. Plus primary CDW, trip cancel $10k/$20k, delay $500 after 12hrs.
Calendar-year, incidentals only (bags, seats, lounge passes, wifi). NOT automatic — call/secure-message J.P. Morgan within 4 billing cycles to claim.
Annual FNA up to 85k points, posts up to 8 weeks after anniversary, 12-month expiry. Top-up with up to 25k points allowed.
Per paid 2+ night stay at participating Ritz-Carlton/St. Regis on eligible rates, paid with card. Dining/spa/recreation; no annual cap stated.
3 Club-Level upgrade certs per anniversary year on paid stays (max 7 nights); book via Ritz reservations line, pay with card.
Gold Elite each year + 15 elite night credits (by Mar 1). Only one consumer Marriott card's ENCs count; Amex Bonvoy Biz can stack a second 15.
PP Select for primary AND authorized users + Sapphire Lounge access. Guests now capped at 2 ($27 each extra) — unlimited-guest era is over.
$120 every 4 years for Global Entry fee paid with card (GE includes TSA PreCheck).
Co-brand tier: 12-mo free DashPass (activate by 12/31/27, then ~$9.99/mo) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo while enrolled.
24/7 J.P. Morgan concierge; free premium in-room internet at Bonvoy hotels; Visa Infinite rental privileges; no FX fees.
6x Marriott; 3x dining, car rentals, airfare direct; 2x other (Bonvoy points).
Primary CDW to $75k; trip delay $500 after 12hrs; lost luggage $3k; $1M travel accident.
Auto-deposited as TravelBank cash within 4 weeks after each anniversary. Use on United/United Express flights.
Per anniversary year on prepaid bookings via Renowned Hotels and Resorts for United Cardmembers, paid with Quest. Also 5x miles + perks.
Per anniversary year on flights booked directly with JSX (semi-private), paid with Quest.

One $10 + one $5 credit per calendar month -- needs two separate Instacart orders to max. REQUIRES an active Instacart+ membership: the card includes 3 months free, then auto-enrolls at 50% off the annual rate. If Instacart+ lapses, the credits stop. Ends 12/31/27.
$8/mo Jan–Nov + $12 in Dec. ⚠️ Requires re-enrollment EVERY January or credits stop.
$40 TravelBank cash for each of your first 2 Avis/Budget rentals per anniversary year, booked at cars.united.com.
10,000-mile discount on a United award flight every anniversary; second one after $20k calendar spend.
1,000 PQP each Feb; 1 PQP per $20 spent (max 18k/yr); 2 Economy Plus upgrades at $40k calendar spend.
You + 1 companion, both bags free (up to $440/roundtrip) — MUST buy ticket with Quest and include MileagePlus #. Priority boarding too.
Up to $120 every 4 years, fee charged to card (you or an AU).

Co-brand tier: 12-mo complimentary DashPass (activate by 12/31/27, auto-bills after) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo while enrolled. ⚠️ UNVERIFIED ON THIS CARD: as of 7/20/26 neither the Chase United Quest page nor cardmembers.united.com/Quest mentions DoorDash or DashPass, and Chase's "over $850 in annual partner credits" sums to the six non-DoorDash credits exactly. May be over-inclusion on our side rather than a removal. Check Chase account > Merchant Offers under this card before relying on it.
benefits.flag: UNVERIFIED on this card — check in-account

benefits.how: 4x United (up to 6x on fares); 5x Renowned Hotels prepaid; 2x other travel, dining, select streaming; 1x other. Award prices 10%+ lower.
Trip cancellation/interruption + trip delay reimbursement on travel paid with card.
One Cat 1–4 free night each anniversary year. Book through Hyatt; room taxes covered.
Second Cat 1–4 night after $15,000 in a CALENDAR year (resets Dec 31, not card anniversary).
Automatic Discoverist + 5 qualifying night credits/yr + 2 more per $5k spent (uncapped).
12-mo free DashPass (activate by 12/31/27, then ~$9.99/mo) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo. The one you caught — confirmed on Chase's page.

New (reservations on/after 6/30/26): Globalist, Explorist and World of Hyatt co-brand cardholders may book award nights ~13 months out -- about 1 month before general members. Applies to full-points and points+cash. NOT stated on the Chase card pages or hyatt.com's card page -- program-side announcement only.
4x Hyatt (up to 9x with member base); 2x restaurants, airfare direct, transit, gyms; 1x other.
Trip cancel/interrupt $5k/traveler, $10k/trip; baggage delay $100/day ×5.
Spend $50+ at any Hyatt property -> $50 credit, up to 2x each anniversary year. Confirmed: no 6-month halves or split-period restriction.
$50k calendar spend → 10% back on redemptions rest of year, on up to 200k points redeemed (max 20k back).
Automatic Discoverist while open, plus gift it to up to 5 employees. 5 tier-qualifying nights per $10k spent. NO anniversary free night on this card.
Company access to Hyatt Leverage corporate rates at participating hotels.
12-mo free DashPass (activate by 12/31/27) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo while enrolled. Needs its own DoorDash account to stack.

New (reservations on/after 6/30/26): Globalist, Explorist and World of Hyatt co-brand cardholders may book award nights ~13 months out -- about 1 month before general members. Applies to full-points and points+cash. NOT stated on the Chase card pages or hyatt.com's card page -- program-side announcement only.
4x Hyatt (up to 9x); 2x your top-3 categories each quarter + gyms; 1x other. Free employee cards.
Posts on anniversary; up to 40k points, top-off with points allowed. Redeem AND stay within 12 months.
STILL ACTIVE. Register card with MileagePlus once. $25 deposits ~Jan 5 & ~Jul 5 — H1 expires Jul 15, H2 expires Jan 15. Tiny use window!
Spend $20k per calendar year → $100 statement credit + 10,000 points.
Automatic Platinum Elite; Diamond Elite with $40k calendar spend (through Dec 31 next year).
4th night free on point stays of 4+ nights, unlimited. Plus 20% off points purchases + early access to reward night sales.
Up to $120 every 4 years, fee charged to card.
12-mo free DashPass (activate by 12/31/27, auto-bills after) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo while enrolled.
Up to 26x total at IHG; 5x travel, gas, dining; 3x other.
Baggage delay $100/day ×3; lost luggage up to $3k.
Posts on anniversary; up to 40k points with top-off; redeem + stay within 12 months.
Active on the business card too. Register with MileagePlus; deposits ~Jan 5 & ~Jul 5 expire Jul 15 / Jan 15.
$20k calendar spend → $100 credit + 10k points. Employee-card spend counts.
Business exclusive: one additional reward night after $60k calendar spend.
Automatic Platinum; Diamond at $40k calendar spend.
4th award night free; 20% off points purchases; free employee cards.
Up to $120 every 4 years, fee charged to card.
12-mo free DashPass (activate by 12/31/27) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo while enrolled.
Up to 26x at IHG; 5x travel, dining, gas, select business; 3x other.
Automatic each anniversary. (Note: AF rose $149→$229 with the 2026 refresh.)
Free Preferred seat at booking; unlimited Extra Legroom upgrades ≤48h out; Group 5 boarding; first checked bag free — you + up to 8 on the reservation.
25% statement credit on inflight buys (drinks — WiFi is now free for Rapid Rewards members).
10k CP qualifying points each Jan (one boost per member/yr across all Southwest cards). 2,500 TQP per $5k spent.
12-mo free DashPass (activate by 12/31/27, auto-bills after) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo while enrolled.
4x Southwest; 2x gas + restaurants; 1x other. No FX fees.
Lost luggage $3k; baggage delay $100/day ×3.
Automatic each anniversary. (AF rose $199→$299 with the 2026 refresh.)
Free Preferred seat at booking; unlimited Extra Legroom upgrades ≤48h; Group 5 boarding; first bag free — you + up to 8. WiFi credits gone (WiFi now free).
Up to $120 every 4 years, fee charged to card.
10k CP qualifying points each Jan — dedupes with Priority card (one per member). 2,500 TQP per $5k. 25% back inflight.
12-mo free DashPass (activate by 12/31/27) + $10/quarter non-restaurant promo while enrolled.
4x Southwest; 2x hotels direct, gas, restaurants, transit/rideshare; 1x other. Free employee cards.
$300 Jan–Jun + $300 Jul–Dec on PREPAID Amex Travel bookings of Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection (THC 2-night min).
Enroll first. $150/calendar year on US Dell; PLUS extra $1,000 after $5,000+ Dell spend in the year.
Enroll; up to $90/quarter directly with Indeed. Confirmed still live July 2026 — survived the refresh.
Enroll; up to $300/calendar year on US ChatGPT Business purchases (auto-renewing subscription).
Enroll; one $250 credit per calendar year after $600+ spent directly with Adobe that year.
Enroll (auto-registers Hilton for Business); up to $50/quarter directly with Hilton.
Enroll; $10/mo on wireless service paid directly to a US provider. Use-it-or-lose-it.
Select ONE airline in your Amex profile each January first; covers incidentals (bags, seats, lounge passes), not fares. Calendar year.

Up to $219/calendar year when auto-renewing CLEAR+ is paid with the card. Raised from $209 on 7/1/26 to match CLEAR's new retail price. Source of truth is CLEAR's own Amex partnership FAQ, which names The Business Platinum Card at $219. Re-checked 7/20/26: Amex still shows $209 on THREE of its own pages (Biz Platinum product page, Aspire product page, and its dedicated CLEAR benefit page) -- the lag is wholesale, not card-specific. A credit could post at $209 before Amex catches up; $219 is the operative figure.
$120 GE or up to $85 TSA PreCheck every 4 years, fee charged to card.

Centurion Lounges; 10 Delta Sky Club visits/yr (flying Delta, visit year runs Feb 1-Jan 31); Priority Pass Select (enroll); Escape, Plaza Premium + more. Note: since ~7/8/26 Centurion Lounge guests must be ticketed on the SAME FLIGHT as the cardmember. The standard entry window remains 3 hours before departure; connecting passengers, previously exempt from any time limit, are now capped at 5 hours before the connecting flight.

benefits.n: Marriott Gold + Hilton Gold + LHW Sterling
benefits.how: Enroll via Amex: Marriott Bonvoy Gold, Hilton Honors Gold, Leaders Club Sterling. Plus Avis/Hertz/National car rental status. NOTE: Hertz President's Circle now requires RE-enrollment (announced ~7/16/26) via Amex Benefits > Car Rental Privileges -- re-enroll by 12/31/26 or risk losing status/CDP.

35% points back on Pay-with-Points flights via Amex Travel, up to 1M pts/yr. Since 9/18/25 the rebate applies ONLY to your one selected qualifying airline (any cabin) — the old 'any premium cabin, any airline' portion was removed.
$250k calendar spend unlocks next year: up to $2,400 Amex One AP fee credits + $1,200 AmexTravel flight credits.
5x flights + prepaid hotels via Amex Travel; 2x key business categories & $5k+ purchases (to $2M/yr, was 1.5x); 1x other.
Trip delay >6hrs: $500/trip (2 claims/12mo). Trip cancel/interrupt: $10k/trip, $20k/12mo. Round trip paid on card.

Enroll; up to $20/mo at Grubhub + US office supply stores. FedEx drops off after 10/1/26 -- Amex's copy reads 'FedEx (through 10/01/2026)', inclusive, though treating 9/30 as the operational deadline is safer since credits can key off posting date. Monthly, no rollover.
Pay one monthly Walmart+ membership with the card; up to $12.95+tax back monthly (Plus Ups excluded).

Enroll; up to $300/calendar year on US ChatGPT Business (launched 5/12/26). Overlaps the Biz Platinum ChatGPT credit — one ChatGPT Business subscription only triggers one card's credit, so run separate workspaces to capture both.
Enroll; up to $150/calendar year on Squarespace or Acuity Scheduling purchases. Live since 10/23/25.
4x on your top 2 of 6 categories each cycle (US ads, US electronics/cloud, US restaurants, US gas, transit, US wireless) up to $150k/yr; 3x Amex Travel flights + prepaid hotels; 1x other.
Per CALENDAR year (not anniversary) on prepaid Delta Stays bookings on delta.com; 'pay at property' excluded. Business version is $250 (personal is $200).

Enroll; up to $20/mo at US Resy restaurants. CHANGE effective 8/1/26: the restaurant must be flagged eligible for the Resy Credit on the Resy site/app AT TIME OF PURCHASE -- previously any Resy-listed restaurant qualified. Check eligibility the day you dine, not when you book. (Amex billing-statement notice; Amex is also folding Tock into Resy this summer.)
Enroll; up to $10/mo on US rideshare with select providers.

Annual on renewal. Valid in Delta First, Premium Select, Comfort+, or Main (not Delta One) within the U.S. and to Mexico, the Caribbean, or Central America. Premium Select eligibility predates 2026; the 6/4/26 change was Delta Vacations redemption eligibility (usable toward the flight portion of a package). Pay $22-$250 taxes/fees.
15 visits per Medallion year flying Delta; unlimited after $75k calendar spend; 4 guest passes/yr; Centurion access when flying Delta on ticket bought with card.
$2,500 MQDs auto each Medallion year + $1 MQD per $10 spent.
$120 GE or up to $85 TSA PreCheck every 4 years. (No CLEAR credit on Delta cards; the '$200 airline fee credit' in the old tracker never existed.)

First + 2nd checked bag free on domestic Delta flights (2nd bag added 6/4/26) + Zone 5 boarding; 20% back inflight; TakeOff 15 (15% off awards); complimentary upgrade list; Hertz President's Circle -- NOTE: Amex now requires RE-enrollment (announced ~7/16/26) via Amex Benefits > Car Rental Privileges; re-enroll by 12/31/26 or risk losing the status and CDP. Also: Global Dining Access by Resy.
3x Delta; 1.5x transit, US shipping, US office supplies (+all purchases after $150k/yr); 1x other. No FX fees.
$200 Jan–Jun + $200 Jul–Dec at participating Hilton Resorts (room + charges paid direct). Check hilton.com eligible-resorts list first.
Up to $50/quarter on flights booked directly with airlines or via Amex Travel. Use-it-or-lose-it each quarter.

Up to $219/calendar year on auto-renewing CLEAR+ paid with card (raised from $209 on 7/1/26). Confirmed by CLEAR's own Amex partnership FAQ, which names Hilton Honors Aspire at $219. Re-checked 7/20/26: Amex's Aspire product page and its dedicated CLEAR benefit page both still read $209 -- stale, not card-specific. Added when Priority Pass was cut 2/1/24.
One FNR at opening + every renewal; valid 12 months at nearly all Hilton properties, any night. 2nd at $30k, 3rd at $60k calendar spend.

Complimentary Hilton Diamond while card is open -- upgrades, breakfast/F&B credit, lounge access. Note: Diamond is no longer Hilton's top tier; Diamond Reserve launched Jan 2026 and is not obtainable via credit card.
Per 2-night-min paid Waldorf Astoria/Conrad stay booked via HiltonHonorsAspireCard.com 'Aspire Card Benefit' rate (or phone code ZZAAP1). On-property credit, not statement.
Enroll via Amex account. Note: Aspire has NO lounge access and NO Global Entry credit (Priority Pass removed 2/1/24).
14x Hilton; 7x flights direct/Amex Travel, car rentals direct, US restaurants; 3x other.
Pay your monthly wireless bill with the Aspire: up to $800/claim, $50 deductible, 2 claims/12 months. In the Guide to Benefits.

One FNA (≤35k points) each year after renewal month; top-off up to 25k points allowed, so it can reach ~60k-point properties. Second FNA after $60k calendar spend. Resort fees may apply. NOTE: the 25k top-off (raised from 15k ~3/12/26) is a program-wide Bonvoy change and is NOT stated on the Amex/Marriott card page -- secondary-sourced. The $125 AF and 35k cap ARE issuer-confirmed on marriott.com.
Gold Elite + 15 elite night credits per calendar year (stacks with the Ritz card's 15 since one is business, one consumer).
Amex Business Card Rate: 7% off eligible direct Bonvoy bookings. No statement credits exist on this card.
6x Marriott (up to 18.5x total); 4x restaurants, US gas, US wireless, US shipping; 2x other. No FX fees.
Auto-loads in Capital One Business Travel; apply at checkout, splittable. Expires at next account anniversary.
Posts automatically each anniversary (~$100 toward travel).

Primary unlimited Capital One Lounge/Landing + Priority Pass (self-enroll). Business card keeps 2 complimentary Priority Pass guests per visit ($35 each beyond 2). Capital One Lounge guests $45 (17&under $25); $75k spend = 2 free C1-lounge guests. AUs $125/yr each. Plaza Premium direct access ended 3/1/25.
Up to $120 every 4 years; pay the fee with the card, credit posts within 2 cycles.
Enroll ONLY via the Hertz tile in Capital One's app/site Benefits tab — enrolling at hertz.com won't link. Active in 24–72h.
$100 experience credit per Premier Collection booking + daily breakfast for 2 + upgrades when available, via Capital One Travel.
2x everything; 10x hotels/cars, 5x flights/vacation rentals via portal. Transfers to 15+ partners mostly 1:1. No FX fees; free employee + virtual cards.
Pay the wireless bill with card: up to $800/claim, $50 deductible, 2 claims/12mo. In Guide to Benefits (not public page) — confirm in yours.
